---
title: "cuhomop: OMOP Database Summary"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
params:
  summary_data: null
  plugins_queries: null
  caboodle_tables: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)
library(stringr)
```

# Database Overview

Summary of the OMOP CDM tables with completeness alerts.

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
res_list <- params$summary_data
plugins_queries <- params$plugins_queries
caboodle_tables <- params$caboodle_tables

for (tab in names(res_list)) {
  res <- res_list[[tab]]
  cat('\n## ', tab, '\n\n\n')
  cat('**Total Rows:** ', format(res$count, big.mark = ','), '\n\n\n')
  
  if (length(plugins_queries[tab]) > 0){
    for (plugin in plugins_queries[tab]){
      cat("### Queries\n\n\n\n<details><summary>SQL Queries</summary><code>")

      if (length(plugin) > 0){
        if (length(plugin[[1]]) > 0){
          sql <- plugin[[1]][[1]] |>
            str_replace_all("\n", "<br>") |>
            str_replace_all(" ", "&nbsp;")
          
          cat(sql)
        }
      }
     # cat(plugin[[1]][[1]])
      
      cat("</code></details>\n\n\n")
    }
  }
  
  if (length(caboodle_tables[tab]) > 0){
    for (plugin in caboodle_tables[tab]){
      cat("### Caboodle tables\n\n\n\n")

      if (length(plugin) > 0){
        if (length(plugin[[1]]) > 0){
          tabs <- paste(unlist(plugin[[1]]), collapse = ", ")

          cat(tabs)
        }
      }
     # cat(plugin[[1]][[1]])

      cat("\n\n\n")
    }
  }
  
  # Render table using gt
  table_obj <- res$cols |> 
    gt() |> 
    tab_header(title = paste('Column Summary:', tab)) |> 
    tab_style(
      style = cell_fill(color = '#ffcccc'),
      locations = cells_body(rows = incomplete == TRUE)
    ) |> 
    cols_label(
      column = 'Column Name',
      incomplete = 'Incomplete?',
      details = 'Concept Info'
    )
  
  # Using as_raw_html to ensure it prints correctly in the loop
  cat(as_raw_html(table_obj))
  
  if(length(res$plots) > 0) {
    cat('\n\n\n')
    print(res$plots$year)
  }
  cat('\n\n---\n\n')
}
```
